uncertainty: No validated GLP-1 agonist and Ozempic medication context model with source provenance and professional review is supplied for this local package.
The supplied rows support evidence-boundary education only and should not be treated as a personal prediction or clinical interpretation.
limitations: This validation result uses selected derived evidence only; raw genome data, VCF, FASTQ, BAM, CRAM, and complete callset files are not included.
The package does not recreate unavailable Sequencing.com authenticated report rows or proprietary third-party output for Ozempic & GLP-1 Agonists Genetic Report.
The package does not support: Ozempic eligibility; GLP-1 response prediction; dose guidance; starting, stopping, or switching medication; weight-loss prediction; side-effect risk estimate.
